config.hotkeyWarning: Note: Only single keys supported (e.g. Right Shift, F9). Some keys may be intercepted by system.
config.apiKeyDesc: Groq API Key, get from https://console.groq.com/keys

pipelineConfig.title: Pipeline Config
pipelineConfig.subtitle: Customize keywords and prompts for each pipeline step
pipelineConfig.keywordsDesc: One word per line, max 10. Add words that are frequently misrecognized. Spaces, commas, or newlines all work.
pipelineConfig.userPromptDesc: Additional correction rules for this step.
pipelineConfig.userPromptPlaceholder:
e.g. Do not use dashes or ellipses
Do not change the meaning of the original text

landing.heroDesc: A local-first, completely free, Chain of Responsibility based AI voice interface.
landing.heroDesc2: Let data return to its source, let thinking be uninterrupted.

mic.title: Uninterrupted Thought Flow
mic.desc: AI needs context, not fragments. Reliquary provides a 'Thinking Buffer' allowing you to organize your logic calmly during Thinking Aloud, feeding a complete high-quality Prompt at once, maximizing AI execution efficiency.

sovereignty.title: Digital Sovereignty
sovereignty.desc: Reject Vendor Lock-in. Your voice data is completely under your control. Carry your complete data assets to switch to any more advanced AI model at any time, making the model a replaceable backend, not your dependency.

pipeline.title: Pipeline Architecture
pipeline.desc: Handle voice like building blocks. Based on the Responsible Chain pattern. Through visual configuration, freely define correction rules, hot word replacement, and text cleaning logic, perfectly adapting to personal habits.

lightweight.title: Lightweight & Ubiquitous
lightweight.desc: Logic at the back, experience seamless. All heavy logic is concentrated in the backend, the frontend remains extremely lightweight and fast. Supports Windows, Linux, macOS, and Android platforms.

speed.title: Groq Powered Speed
speed.desc: Built on Groq chips, experience extreme generation speeds of 500+ Tokens per second. Call top open-source models like Llama 3 or Mixtral at zero cost, say goodbye to latency, free and powerful.

docker.title: One-Click Fortress
docker.desc: One command to build a digital fortress. Reject complex configurations, achieve one-click deployment via Docker Compose. Instantly launch your private voice service locally or in the cloud.

trial.title: Start Trial,
trial.p1: I currently do not provide commercial services. This trial is only to lower the barrier for beginners and avoid deployment hassles.
trial.p3: Daily at 3AM, your account and all generated voice data will be thoroughly and permanently deleted.
trial.p4: After satisfaction, I strongly recommend local deployment to keep data truly in your hands.
